arts.sum: We’ve made two changes to the team that started at Brentford on Sunday as new signing Kevin Danso comes straight in for his debut in the heart of our defence. Substitutes: Austin, Pedro Porro, Reguilon, Cassanova, Bergvall, Olusesi, Ajayi, Moore, Tel.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel was ready to join Marseille before choosing Premier League move
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport journalist Fabrice Hawkins, Mathys Tel (19) was at one stage ready to join Olympique de Marseille during the winter transfer window. Marseille had…

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Tottenham: Carabao Cup semi-final, second leg – live
arts.sum: Carabao Cup semi-final, 8pm GMT kick-off (first leg 0-1) Live scoreboard | Read the latest edition of Football Daily Read Jacob Steinberg’s preview Fresh from overseeing a dogged 2-0 win against Brentford on Sunday, Postecoglou sat down and spoke for 43 minutes before a moment that could define his time in north London. The head coach considered the chance for Spurs “to make a big impact” by going to Anfield and building on their 1-0 win in the first leg. He thought about his captain, Son Heung-min, still being trophyless after nearly 10 years at the club. He seemed energised by sealing deals for the centre-back Kevin Danso and the French forward Mathys Tel at the end of a difficult transfer window. The tie will go to extra time if necessary, then penalties There’s no away goals rule VAR is being used Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Is there extra-time and penalties in Liverpool vs Tottenham Carabao Cup semi-final?
arts.sum: The semi-final stage also saw VAR being used for the first time in the competition, this season, with Spurs on the wrong end of one decision that saw a Dominic Solanke goal disallowed for offside. It is worth noting that away goals do not count, either, so if Liverpool were winning 2-1 or 3-2 at the final whistle, extra-time and potentially penalties will be needed to decide the winner.

arts.ttl: Is there VAR for Liverpool vs Tottenham Hotspur? Carabao Cup semi-final rules confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool face Spurs at Anfield tonight for a nail-biting second-leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final

arts.ttl: Liverpool County FA coach leads England Parkinson’s Walking Football Team in USA tournament
arts.sum: Stuart Carrington, LCFA’s football development officer and manager of the England Parkinson’s Walking Football Team, flew to the Cinco Soccer centre in Tampa, FL, with two squads to introduce walking football to communities in the USA.

arts.ttl: New Tottenham star opens up on move amid Man Utd lesson and huge Arsenal opportunity
arts.sum: Their latest defeat came last Sunday as Manchester United secured a 1-0 win at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Arsenal are their next opponents, with the game taking place across north London at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Matheus Cunha's eight-figure release clause after he signed new Wolves deal amid interest from Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY SAMI MOKBEL: But the Brazil international signed a new four-and-a-half year deal over the weekend to commit his immediate future to the Molineux club.
